title: Weights
description: A simple mod for entities, to have Weight and Mod Weight Library
body:
This Mod works as a Library for Mobs, to have weights.

With this, you are able to create other mods, to use the attribute "**Weight**". Which reaches up to 2 million kg.

# How to
1. Add the entity to the tag "**forge:weighted**"
2. and set the attribute "**Weight**" of the entity to your desired kg/ton at spawning/coding
